name: ARTELO BIOSCIENCES, INC.
business: Artelo Biosciences is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapeutics that target lipid-signaling modulation pathways, including the endocannabinoid system. The company's product pipeline includes ART27.13, a dual cannabinoid agonist for cancer-related anorexia currently in Phase 1b/2a; ART26.12, a fatty acid binding protein 5 inhibitor for chemotherapy-induced peripheral neuropathy in Phase 1; and ART12.11, a proprietary synthetic CBD cocrystal for anxiety and other indications in preclinical development. No products have been approved for commercial sale, and the company has not generated any revenue.
sellsTo: patients with anxiety disorders, depression, PTSD, epilepsy, insomnia
patients with pain, inflammation, dermatologic conditions

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of therapeutics that target lipid-signaling modulation pathways, including the endocannabinoid system (the ECS), a network of receptors and neurotransmitters that form a biochemical communication system throughout the body.

catalysts.event: Announcement of interim results from Phase 2a CAReS trial for ART27.13
catalysts.sentence: On September 3, 2025, we announced interim results from the Phase 2a CAReS trial.

catalysts.event: Completion of dosing for Phase 1 Single Ascending Dose study of ART26.12
catalysts.sentence: We successfully completed dosing all 48 healthy volunteers planned for the Phase 1 Single Ascending Dose study at the end of April 2025.

catalysts.event: Announcement of favorable results from first-in-human study of ART26.12
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we announced favorable results from our first-in-human study evaluating ART26.12.
